sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66179" key="meloko/phsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελο-κόπησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n66179.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mutilation</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:280" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">280</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
